product.name: Amazon Basics 2-Pack USB 3.0 Extension Cable, Fast Data Transfer 4.8Gbps, USB-A Male to Female, Gold-Plated Connectors, 3 Foot, Black
product.description: Product Description               Amazon Basics USB 3.0 Extension Cable - A-Male to A-Female Extender Cord - 3 .3 Feet (2 Pack)                  From the Manufacturer               Amazon Basics
features: IN THE BOX: 3.3-foot USB 3.0 A-male to A-female high-speed extension cable (2-pack)
CONVENIENT: Extends a USB connection from a computer; ideal for printers, cameras, mice, and other USB computer peripherals
GOLD-PLATED CONNECTORS: Corrosion-resistant, gold-plated connectors for optimal signal clarity
PROTECTIVE SHIELDING: Shielding protects against noise, minimizing interference for a clear signal
USB 3.0: Uses less power, but has increased power output (up to 4.8 Gbit/s); 10X faster compared to USB 2.0
